utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: 1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides both with named plans and monthly costs—fully specified. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides a named plan and monthly cost—fully specified. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan provides a named plan and monthly cost—fully specified. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists telemedicine with plan name and monthly cost—fully specified. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly upgraded_total, current_spend, and difference; it lacks an explicit annual breakdown, which the format asks for as a "complete monthly/annual cost breakdown." Because annual is missing, this item is not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health), EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property), EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel), and Telemedicine Services (additional service). I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health has rating 3; EliteCare Premium Plan under primary_health_coverage.mental_health has rating 2; EliteHome Premium Coverage under property_protection.home_content has rating 2; EliteTravel Premium Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance has rating 2; Telemedicine Services under health_enhancement_services has rating 10.
